title: Smoky Salad with Greek Dressing
description: A unique fusion of smoky flavors with a crunchy, refreshing salad, all topped with a zesty Greek dressing.
instructions: Prepare the Greek dressing by whisking together 2 tablespoons olive oil, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, and 1 minced clove garlic.
In a large bowl, combine the crispy, pecorino, and salad.
Add the prepared Greek dressing to the bowl and toss to combine.
Top with the smoky and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional pecorino cheese if desired.
